objectives: Software Engineer with 2.5+ years of experience building responsive web and mobile applications using React.js and React Native with strong interest and hands-on experience in Web3/Blockchain integration. Proficient in modern JavaScript/TypeScript frameworks, UI development and API integration. Comfortable collaborating with backend systems and deploying full-stack solutions.
mobile-applications-development-descript: Developed cross-platform mobile applications with a keen focus on crafting intuitive UI, flawless UX, adaptive, responsive designs and seamless integration with backend services.
websites-development-description: Building high-performance, user friendly websites with professional interfaces using cutting edge technologies for efficient and scalable web applications.
blockchain-description: Focused on creating secure, efficient blockchain products that fully leverage Smart Contracts and decentralized networks.
backend-development-description: Focused on building high performance backend systems that handle heavy traffic, ensuring scalability and easy maintainability.
education-school: Software Engineering | Cao Thang Technical College
vinadao-summary: A blockchain powered decentralized platform transforming real estate investments through secure, transparent and efficient transaction solutions
vinadao-description-1: Lead frontend architecture for VinaDAO, integrating blockchain wallets (Wagmi, Viem) and fiat-onramp services (Transak) using React.js
vinadao-description-2: Built and deployed with AWS Amplify, S3, CI/CD pipelines via GitHub Actions
vinadao-description-3: Established coding standards and best practices, improving code quality and team efficiency
internal-chrome-extension-summary: Crypto wallet extension enabling seamless cross chain transactions, fiat to crypto purchasing, decentralized social engagement and real time wallet activity updates
internal-chrome-extension-description-1: Developed a multi-chain wallet Chrome Extension with React.js, integrating MoonPay, Farcaster, WrapCast and TON blockchain ecosystem
internal-chrome-extension-description-2: Collaborated with Web3 and Backend teams to optimize cross chain wallet operations and decentralized notifications
mozanio-summary: Mobile app streamlining coffee shop operations through integrated menu management, inventory tracking, and order processing to enhance business efficiency and customer engagement
mozanio-duration-description-1: Refactored legacy React Native application for Mozanio Vendor/User, improving performance and stability across Android/iOS platforms
mozanio-duration-description-2: Built new module for menu management and mobile ordering, integrating backend APIs and enhancing user experience
celeb-confirmed-summary: Mobile app delivering real-time news, interviews and insights on Korean celebrities serving as a dedicated platform for K-pop fans and enthusiasts
celeb-confirmed-description-1: Developed a React Native mobile app for Korean celebrity news, transforming Figma design into pixel perfect UI components
celeb-confirmed-description-2: Conducted rigorous debugging and optimization, improving app performance and user satisfaction
mobile-developer-intern-description-1: Developed cross-platform apps using React Native
mobile-developer-intern-description-2: Implemented Redux for state management, integrated Firebase for authentication and image storage
mobile-developer-intern-description-3: Contributing to real world e-commerce and social media projects
sencam-summary: Platform offering free banner templates and custom design requests with free/premium tiers for flexible premium quality solutions tailored to individuals and organizations
sencam-description-1: Delivered a fully responsive web application using React.js and Strapi CMS
sencam-description-2: Managed end to end deployment pipeline including build optimization and production release
